letter-spacing: 1px; margin-bottom: 20px; animation: fadeInDown 0.6s ease both; } .hero-title { font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 5vw, 3rem); font-weight: 900; line-height: 1.2; margin-bottom: 14px; animation: fadeInUp 0.7s ease both; animation-delay: 0.1s; } .hero-title span { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--gold-light), var(--gold), var(--gold-dark)); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text; } .hero-sub { font-size: 1rem; color: var(--text-muted); max-width: 420px; line-height: 1.7; margin-bottom: 40px; animation: fadeInUp 0.7s ease both; animation-delay: 0.2s; } .hero-stats { display: flex; gap: 24px; margin-bottom: 44px; animation: fadeInUp 0.7s ease both; animation-delay: 0.3s; } .stat { text-align: center; background: rgba(201,168,76,0.08); border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.2); border-radius: 14px; padding: 16px 24px; } .stat-num { font-size: 1.8rem; font-weight: 900; color: var(--gold-light); line-height: 1; } .stat-label { font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 4px; } .btn-start { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--gold) 0%, var(--gold-dark) 100%); color: var(--navy); font-family: 'Cairo', sans-serif; font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 900; padding: 16px 40px; border-radius: 50px; border: none; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(201,168,76,0.35); transition: all 0.3s ease; animation: fadeInUp 0.7s ease both; animation-delay: 0.4s; text-decoration: none; } .btn-start:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 14px 40px rgba(201,168,76,0.5); } .btn-start .arrow { font-size: 1.2rem; transition: transform 0.3s; } .btn-start:hover .arrow { transform: translateX(-6px); } /* ====== MAIN APP SECTION ====== */ #app { position: relative; z-index: 1; display: none; padding: 0 0 80px; } /* ====== APP HEADER ====== */ .app-header { background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(13,27,42,0.98) 0%, rgba(13,27,42,0.8) 100%); backdrop-filter: blur(20px); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.15); padding: 16px 24px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 100; } .header-logo { width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 50%; background: white; padding: 4px; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(201,168,76,0.4); } .header-logo img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: contain; border-radius: 50%; } .header-title { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 900; color: var(--gold-light); } .header-sub { font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--text-muted); } .back-btn { background: rgba(201,168,76,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.25); border-radius: 10px; padding: 8px 14px; color: var(--gold-light); font-family: 'Cairo', sans-serif; font-size: 0.82rem; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s; } .back-btn:hover { background: rgba(201,168,76,0.2); } /* ====== PROGRESS ====== */ .progress-wrap { padding: 20px 24px 0; } .progress-info { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 10px; } .progress-label { font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--text-muted); } .progress-count { font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--gold-light); } .progress-bar { height: 5px; border-radius: 10px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); overflow: hidden; } .progress-fill { height: 100%; background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--gold-dark), var(--gold-light)); border-radius: 10px; transition: width 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); width: 0%; } /* ====== CATEGORY FILTER ====== */ .categories { display: flex; gap: 10px; padding: 20px 24px; overflow-x: auto; scrollbar-width: none; -ms-overflow-style: none; } .categories::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; } .cat-btn { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 8px 18px; border-radius: 50px; border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.2); background: rgba(201,168,76,0.06); color: var(--text-muted); font-family: 'Cairo', sans-serif; font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; transition: all 0.25s; flex-shrink: 0; } .cat-btn:hover, .cat-btn.active { background: rgba(201,168,76,0.18); border-color: rgba(201,168,76,0.5); color: var(--gold-light); } .cat-btn.active { font-weight: 900; } /* ====== CARDS GRID ====== */ .cards-section { padding: 0 20px; } .section-title { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 18px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .section-title::before { content: ''; width: 3px; height: 18px; background: var(--gold); border-radius: 2px; display: inline-block; } .cards-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(300px, 1fr)); gap: 20px; } /* ====== FLIP CARD ====== */ .flip-card { height: 280px; perspective: 1200px; cursor: pointer; animation: cardIn 0.5s ease both; } @keyframes cardIn { from { opacity:0; transform: translateY(30px); } to { opacity:1; transform: translateY(0); } } .flip-inner { position: relative; width: 100%; height: 100%; transform-style: preserve-3d; transition: transform 0.65s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0.2, 0.2, 1); border-radius: var(--radius); } .flip-card.flipped .flip-inner { transform: rotateY(180deg); } .flip-front, .flip-back { position: absolute; inset: 0; border-radius: var(--radius); backface-visibility: hidden; -webkit-backface-visibility: hidden; overflow: hidden; } /* FRONT */ .flip-front { background: var(--card-bg); border: 1px solid var(--navy-border); display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 30px 24px; text-align: center; transition: border-color 0.3s; } .flip-card:hover .flip-front { border-color: rgba(201,168,76,0.4); } .front-glow { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 0%, rgba(201,168,76,0.08) 0%, transparent 60%); pointer-events: none; } .card-icon-wrap { width: 80px; height: 80px; border-radius: 20px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 2.2rem; margin-bottom: 18px; position: relative; } .card-icon-wrap::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: -1px; border-radius: 22px; border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.3); } .card-number { position: absolute; top: 16px; right: 16px; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 700; color: rgba(201,168,76,0.4); background: rgba(201,168,76,0.08); border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.15); border-radius: 6px; padding: 3px 8px; } .card-title { font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 900; color: var(--white); line-height: 1.3; margin-bottom: 10px; } .card-hint { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--text-muted); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; margin-top: 4px; } .card-hint-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; animation: blink 2s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes blink { 0%,100%{opacity:1} 50%{opacity:0.3} } .learned-badge { position: absolute; top: 14px; left: 14px; background: rgba(34,197,94,0.2); border: 1px solid rgba(34,197,94,0.4); border-radius: 6px; padding: 3px 8px; font-size: 0.68rem; color: #6EE7A0; display: none; } .flip-card.learned .learned-badge { display: block; } /* BACK */ .flip-back { transform: rotateY(180deg); display: flex; flex-direction: column; padding: 24px; } .back-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 18px; padding-bottom: 14px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.15); } .back-icon { font-size: 1.6rem; } .back-title { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 900; } .back-sub { font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 2px; } .tips-list { flex:1; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:10px; overflow-y:auto; } .tips-list::-webkit-scrollbar { width:4px; } .tips-list::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: transparent; } .tips-list::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: rgba(201,168,76,0.3); border-radius:4px; } .tip-item { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 10px; } .tip-bullet { width: 24px; height: 24px; border-radius: 7px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 800; flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 1px; border: 1px solid; } .tip-text { font-size: 0.85rem; line-height: 1.5; color: rgba(248,246,240,0.88); } .mark-btn { margin-top: 16px; padding: 10px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.3); background: rgba(201,168,76,0.1); color: var(--gold-light); font-family: 'Cairo', sans-serif; font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; } .mark-btn:hover { background: rgba(201,168,76,0.22); } .flip-card.learned .mark-btn { background: rgba(34,197,94,0.15); border-color: rgba(34,197,94,0.35); color: #6EE7A0; } /* ====== COMPLETION SCREEN ====== */ #complete-screen { display: none; position: fixed; inset: 0; background: rgba(13,27,42,0.97); z-index: 200; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; text-align: center; padding: 40px 24px; } .complete-icon { font-size: 5rem; margin-bottom: 24px; animation: bounce 1s ease; } @keyframes bounce { 0%{transform:scale(0)} 60%{transform:scale(1.2)} 100%{transform:scale(1)} } .complete-title { font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 900; color: var(--gold-light); margin-bottom: 14px; } .complete-sub { font-size: 1rem; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 32px; max-width: 360px; line-height: 1.7; } .complete-btns { display:flex; gap:14px; flex-wrap:wrap; justify-content:center; } .btn-complete { padding: 14px 30px; border-radius: 50px; font-family: 'Cairo', sans-serif; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s; border: none; text-decoration: none; } .btn-complete.primary { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--gold), var(--gold-dark)); color: var(--navy); } .btn-complete.secondary { background: rgba(201,168,76,0.12); border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.3); color: var(--gold-light); } .btn-complete:hover { transform: scale(1.04); } /* ====== CONFETTI PARTICLES ====== */ .confetti-wrap { position: fixed; inset: 0; pointer-events: none; z-index: 201; overflow: hidden; } .confetti-piece { position: absolute; width: 8px; height: 14px; border-radius: 2px; animation: confettiFall linear both; } @keyframes confettiFall { 0% { transform: translateY(-20px) rotate(0deg); opacity: 1; } 100% { transform: translateY(110vh) rotate(720deg); opacity: 0; } } /* ====== ANIMATIONS ====== */ @keyframes fadeInDown { from { opacity:0; transform:translateY(-20px); } to { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); } } @keyframes fadeInUp { from { opacity:0; transform:translateY(20px); } to { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); } } /* ====== FOOTER ====== */ .app-footer { text-align: center; padding: 30px 24px; border-top: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.1); margin-top: 40px; } .footer-logo-wrap { display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:12px; margin-bottom:10px; } .footer-logo { width:36px; height:36px; border-radius:50%; background:white; padding:3px; } .footer-logo img { width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:contain; border-radius:50%; } .footer-name { font-size:0.85rem; font-weight:700; color:var(--gold-light); } .footer-copy { font-size:0.72rem; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.2); margin-top:6px; } /* ====== RESPONSIVE ====== */ @media (max-width: 600px) { .cards-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .flip-card { height: 260px; } .hero-stats { gap: 12px; } .stat { padding: 12px 16px; } }
